description: The page begins to load, showing a green background with placeholders before the full content appears.
frame_description: A green background with white placeholder boxes is visible as the page loads.

description: The 'Compare home loans' page fully loads, displaying interest rates and loan comparison tools.
frame_description: The full 'Compare home loans' page is visible with various loan options and filters.

description: Additional loan results and filter options load below the initial fold of the page.
frame_description: The page layout shifts slightly as more content and filter dropdowns appear below the main header.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Property purpose' dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Property purpose' filter dropdown.

description: The user scrolls down the page to view the list of home loan results.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls down.

description: The user hovers over several loan cards, likely scanning the interest rates and features.
frame_description: The cursor moves across different loan result cards in the list.

description: The user continues scrolling down the list of loan options.
frame_description: The user scrolls further down the results list.

description: The user hovers over more loan cards further down the list.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over loan cards as the user reviews the options.

description: The user scrolls down towards the bottom of the first page of results.
frame_description: The user scrolls to the bottom of the current set of loan results.

description: The user switches to the Askable browser tab.
frame_description: The screen switches to the Askable platform's explore page.

description: The user views the task instructions on the Askable platform, remaining on this screen for several seconds to read.
frame_description: The user is looking at a page with detailed task instructions for the study.

description: The user switches back to the Mortgage Choice browser tab.
frame_description: The screen switches back to the loan comparison results.

description: The user hovers over the loan cards again after returning to the page.
frame_description: The cursor is visible again, hovering over the loan results.

description: The user scrolls down to the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to reach the pagination controls.

description: The user hovers over the loan cards at the bottom of the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the final few loan cards on the page.

description: The user scrolls to the very bottom of the results list to access the pagination.
frame_description: The user scrolls to the bottom of the results list.

description: The user hovers over the 'Next' button in the pagination section.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to navigate to more results.

description: The page content updates as the next set of results or a detailed view loads.
frame_description: The screen goes white briefly as the new content loads.

description: The user hovers over the interest rate section of a specific loan detail page.
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the interest rate details on a loan information page.

description: The user hovers over the 'Calculators' menu in the navigation bar.
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the 'Calculators' link in the header.

description: The 'Calculators' dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: The 'Calculators' dropdown menu is visible, showing various calculator options.

description: The user hovers over different items within the 'Calculators' dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the items in the open dropdown menu.

description: The 'Calculators' dropdown menu closes.
frame_description: The dropdown menu disappears as the user moves the cursor away.

description: The user scrolls down to the 'Home loans from other lenders' section.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to view alternative loan options.

description: The user hovers over the 'Home loans from other lenders' heading.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the heading for alternative loan options.

description: The user scrolls down to view the loan cards from other lenders.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to see the cards for other lenders.

description: The user hovers over loan cards from other lenders.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the loan cards in the 'other lenders' section.

description: The user scrolls further down the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to the bottom of the page.

description: The user hovers over more loan options at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the final loan options on the page.

description: The user scrolls back up the page to review previous options.
frame_description: The user scrolls up through the list of loan results.

description: The user hovers over loan cards while scrolling back up.
frame_description: The cursor moves over loan cards as the user scrolls up.

description: The user continues scrolling up towards the top of the page.
frame_description: The user scrolls further up the page.

description: The user hovers over the information icon next to the 'Comparison rate'.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'i' icon next to the comparison rate.

description: The page content briefly flashes or updates.
frame_description: The screen flashes pink/white as content updates or a transition occurs.

description: The user scrolls down the page again.
frame_description: The user scrolls down the page once more.
